blocks.text: Udyam Registration
What is Udyam Registration?

Udyam is the registration of a business under MSME (Micro Small Medium Enterprises). www.udyamregistration.gov.in is the official portal to register a new MSME or to re-register already registered EM – II (Entrepreneurs Memorandum Part – II) or UAM (UdyogAadhaar Memorandum). The Ministry of Micro Small Medium Enterprises maintains this portal.
Micro Enterprise
An enterprise whose investment in Plant, Machinery and Equipments does not exceeds One Crore and turnover does not exceeds Five Crores is a Micro Enterprise.
Udyam Registration Online for Rs.1000
Get Expert Advice
Fill the details below for a callback.
Request Callback
Benefits of Udyam Registration
Collateral Free Loans from Bank

The Credit Guarantee Fund Scheme (CGS) for Micro and Small Enterprises was launched by the Government of India to make available collateral-free credit to the micro and small enterprise sectors. This initiative guarantees funds to micro and small sector enterprises. Under this scheme, both the old as well as the new enterprises can claim the benefits.
Easy Clearance of Pending Payments

Under the MSME registration benefits, a buyer is expected to make a payment for the goods/services within 15 days of the purchase. If the buyer delays, the payment for more than 45 days, the enterprise is eligible to charge compound interest which is 3 times the rate notified by RBI.
Overdraft Facility with Interest Exemption

Businesses or enterprises registered as MSME/SSI under the MSME Act are eligible to avail a benefit of 1% on the overdraft as part of the Credit Guarantee Trust Fund Scheme although this may vary from bank to bank.
50% discount on trademark and Patent Fees
Business enterprises registered under the MSME Act are given a hefty subsidy of 50 per cent for patent registration. This can be availed by sending an application to the respective ministry.
Some Concession on Electricity bills
A business with Udyam Registration can avail concession on electricity bills. Registered MSME have to submit the bill along with the application and copy of registered Certificate.
Reimbursement of ISO Certification charges
Registered MSME‘s can claim the expenses for reimbursement that were spent on ISO certification.
Government Tenders
Registered MSME‘s can get Government tenders easily
Tax Exemptions
Registered MSME‘s get exemptions under direct tax laws
Documents Required for Udyam Registration

items: Business Address Proof: Electricity / Telephone bill of the Registered Office
GST Certificate: GST Registration Certificate (If Registered)
PAN Card: PAN Card Copy of Entity
Proof of Entity: Partnership Deed/ MoA and AoA

PRC (for Schedule III): For firms that are listed in Schedule -III of the Industrial Licensing Exemption Notification, no Industrial license is needed. Every other enterprise must obtain it for the PRC (Provisional Registration Certificate) application.

Statutory Administrative Clearences: For the registration and document process, all statutory and administrative clearances need to be obtained such an NOC from pollution board to prove that no restrictions are being violated.

blocks.text: Eligibility for Udyam Registration

Eligibility for Udyam (MSME) registration is depending on the scale of business of the enterprise. Udyam registration is applicable for Proprietorship, One Person Company, Partnership Firm, Private Limited Company, Public Limited Company, Producer Company, Limited Liability Partnerships, Co-operative Societies, Hindu Undivided Families (HUF) or any association of Persons or any other undertakings, which are eligible for counted under Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises.
Micro Enterprise
An enterprise whose investment in Plant, Machinery and Equipments does not exceeds One Crore and turnover does not exceeds Five Crores is a Micro Enterprise.
Small Enterprise
An enterprise whose investment in Plant, Machinery and Equipments does not exceed Ten Crores and turnover does not exceed Fifty Crores is a Small Enterprise.
Medium Enterprise
An enterprise whose investment in Plant, Machinery and Equipment does not exceed Fifty Crores, and turnover does not exceed Two Hundred and Fifty Crores is Medium Enterprise.

The Process of Registering for Udyam (MSME)
Day 1 – 4

items: Collection of Information
Collection of required documents (Scanned Copies)
PAN cards
Rental agreement for the office address (if rented)
Electricity bill
Identity and address proofs of the proprietor/partners/directors
For private limited companies: Memorandum and Articles of Association, Form 32, Form 18, Certificate of incorporation
For Partnerships: Partnership agreement
Review of documents and information provided

blocks.text: Day 4 – 6

items: Application for Udyam submitted with collected documents
In some states additional paperwork may be needed like sale bill of Machinery and Municipal Clearance, etc.

blocks.text: Day 7 – 20

items: Government Processing Time
In normal cases your Udyam Registration Certificate will be ready after 5 – 10 days of submission of application
If production is not begun/ business is not commenced a provisional certificate will be issued for 5 years. It become permanent when the unit is functioning.

blocks.text: Frequently Asked Questions
What is Udyam Registration?

Udyam Registration, also known as MSME Registration, is a government registration for micro, small, and medium-sized enterprises in India. It provides them with a unique identity number and access to various benefits.
Is Udyam registration mandatory?
Udyam registration is not mandatory, but it is highly recommended to avail the benefits offered by the government under the MSME scheme.
Who can apply for Udyam registration?
Any enterprise that falls under the category of micro, small, or medium enterprise, based on its investment and turnover, can apply for Udyam registration.
What is the validity of the Udyam registration?
Udyam registration is valid for a lifetime and does not require any renewal.
Can I update the information after registration?
Yes, you can update the information provided at the time of registration by visiting the official Udyam registration portal.
